name: WORLD KINECT CORP
business: World Kinect Corporation is a global energy management company offering fuel fulfillment and related services to customers in the aviation, marine, and land transportation sectors. It also supplies natural gas along with a complementary suite of sustainability-related products and services. The company operates through three reportable segments: aviation, land, and marine.
sellsTo: marine (container, dry bulk, tanker fleets, cruise lines)
land (commercial, industrial, government, retail fuel outlets)

exposures.sentence: We are a global energy management company offering fulfillment and related services to customers across the aviation, marine, and land transportation sectors.

We have been taking actions designed to increase the availability of renewable and lower-carbon fuels such as sustainable aviation fuel and are working to expand and develop our supply chain to meet customer demand.

Cybersecurity incidents have in the past and may in the future arise from employee or contractor error or misuse or unauthorized use of information technology systems or confidential information, individual attempts to gain unauthorized access to these information systems, and sophisticated cybersecurity attacks, known as advanced persistent threats, any of which may impact us directly or indirectly through our customers, suppliers or third-party service providers.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Universal Weather and Aviation's Trip Support Services division
catalysts.sentence: On November 5, 2025, we completed the acquisition of Universal Weather and Aviation's Trip Support Services division ("Universal TSS") for a total purchase price of approximately $207.0 million.

catalysts.event: Sale of WFL (UK) Ltd. (Watson Fuels sale)
catalysts.sentence: On April 9, 2025, we signed and closed on the sale of WFL (UK) Ltd., which represents our U.K. land fuels business (the "Watson Fuels sale").

catalysts.event: Completion of global finance and accounting optimization transition activities
catalysts.sentence: We plan to complete the transition activities associated with the global finance and accounting optimization in the fourth quarter of 2026 and expect to recognize an additional $10.8 million in transition costs and one-time charges associated with the planned global finance and accounting initiatives during the year ending December 31, 2026.
